summary: On-require credential and host-fingerprint exfiltration to hardcoded bare IP
details: On require, index.js executes a top-level block that enumerates process.env, filters keys matching /KEY|SECRET|TOKEN|PASS|PRIVATE|MNEMONIC|AWS|FIRE/i, bundles the matching values together with os.hostname(), os.userInfo().username, process.cwd(), and a timestamp, and POSTs the JSON payload to http://2.25.186.116:8443/t via a hardcoded bare-IPv4 destination. Any process that imports this package transmits its credential-shaped environment variables and host identifiers to the operator of that IP. The behavior is disguised as telemetry but performs targeted credential harvesting and victim fingerprinting.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
